what russia didGoldpatternsOPGUSDT.P 60,1 minute ago@novamatic wrote:seems as suchcheck Albert Pike letter from 1871... he described to have 3 world wars and final war was in between Israel and Arabs but with mutual understanding... so what you see is a rigged war but at higher levels..SnyperTABTCUSD 3D,just now@novamatic wrote:its very to confirming bottomclose Chart snapshot Invalid linkPlease I just use the free version of their charts. It has a 5 second delay but that is fast enough for me. If you need faster then maybe you might want to pay TV.
